spacing_and_layout.grid_system: Bento Grid for categories, Responsive column grid for products (grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-4 lg:grid-cols-5)

product_card.style: Flat background, 1px subtle border border-gray-200, no shadow by default
product_card.badges: absolute top-2 left-2 bg-white px-2 py-1 text-xs font-bold rounded-md

hero_section.style: High impact, split layout or large centered with product collage
hero_section.search_bar: Massive search bar, h-16, text-lg, rounded-full border-2 border-gray-950 focus:ring-4 focus:ring-red-100 shadow-sm

header.style: Sticky top-0 z-50 bg-white/90 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-gray-200

buttons.primary: rounded-full px-8 py-4 font-bold transition-all bg-red-600 text-white hover:bg-red-700 active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: rounded-full px-8 py-4 font-bold transition-all bg-black text-white hover:bg-gray-800 active:scale-95

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: All cards and buttons must have hover states (transform, shadow, color)
motion_and_interactions.page_load: Staggered fade-up for product grids using framer-motion
motion_and_interactions.micro_interactions: Heart icon pop on click, cart counter bump

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text meets APCA standards. Black/Red on White.
accessibility.testing_attributes: All interactive elements must have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='add-to-cart-button')

images.description: Person handing over delivery box - for hero background or main promotional banner
Bracelets on wooden tray - Fashion/Jewelry category or featured product
Headphones in charging case - Electronics category or featured product
Handmade pottery vase - Home Goods/Crafts category or featured product
Stack of delivery boxes - Logistics, shipping info, or deals section banner
Toy shopping cart with boxes - Great for the 'Deals/Promo' banner

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a high-contrast, authority-driven e-commerce landing page using the Swiss & High-Contrast archetype.
Use Cabinet Grotesk for headings and Outfit for body text.
The hero section should prominently feature a massive search bar and direct shoppers to explore.
Product cards must be clean, flat with a 1px border, and have a clear hover lift effect.
Include specific sections: Hero (with search), Categories Bento Grid, Featured/Trending Products (grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-4), Deals/Promo banner, and Trust Badges.
Avoid standard Vercel/Stripe looks. Emphasize dense, structured data (like Amazon) but with refined typography and generous spacing (like Etsy).
Use Phosphor Icons (@phosphor-icons/react) for UI icons (cart, search, user, heart).
Ensure all interactive elements have data-testid attributes for testing.
